free_text: First author V.N.Dushin. Description of experimental

Fission neutron multiplicity for spontaneous fission
ionization chamber for spectroscopy of fission
fragments. The fission chamber was placed between
two scintillator tanks.Gas mixture - 90% Ar + 10% CH4
scintillator tanks, each of 40 cm length an 90 cm
diameter, contained 200 l of liquid scintillator doped
with 1 wt% of Gd, with optical glass windows by 5 PMTs
Photomultipliers were calibrated by Co-60 source.
